strengths: All 4 intent types (ASK, REFINE, NEW_DIRECTION, OFF_TOPIC) handled in a single sendMessage entry point per the spec's Option A constraint (service.ts:998-1041)

Ownership guards (workspaceId mismatch -> 404) present on BOTH confirmRegenerateBoard (service.ts:1059-1061) and cancelRegenerateBoard (service.ts:1092-1094), placed before any mutation, matching the getCardOutput/sendMessage pattern
User message stored at service.ts:960-964 before the status branch, so a 'running' board still records the message per spec Rule 1
runPipeline fired non-awaited with .catch error handler (service.ts:1077-1079), mirroring the approve route's fire-and-forget so the request returns promptly
Conversation history preserved across regeneration — confirmRegenerateBoard deletes only outputs and cards, never agent_conversations (service.ts:1072-1074)
All 51 tests pass; pendingRegenerate uses an in-memory Map keyed by boardId storing the raw triggering message as the new intent, exactly per plan
No new top-level imports, no DB/LLM direct dependencies — new capabilities added as injected deps on AgentBoardServiceDeps (service.ts:192-209), preserving the DI architecture rule
Only the two in-scope files changed (service.ts, service.test.ts); no schema or templates.ts changes
